summary: Dengue virus exhibits a unique phenomenon called antibody-dependent enhancement. This occurs when prior immunity from related viruses exacerbates symptoms during secondary infections with different strains or species of dengue virus. \boxed{\text{D}}
formatted_summary: agent2 (Round 1 summarized): Dengue virus exhibits a unique phenomenon called antibody-dependent enhancement. This occurs when prior immunity from related viruses exacerbates symptoms during secondary infections with different strains or species of dengue virus. \boxed{\text{D}}. Answer choice: D
